metadata.name: Tag an Article for the Archive

description: After a story is published, an archivist needs to add relevant metadata and tags to it before committing it to the long-term digital archive.

nodes.task_description: Read the article to identify the key people, places, organizations, and topics mentioned.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a list of key entities in the story.

nodes.task_description: Enter these key entities as tags in the archive management system.

expected_outcome.expected: The article is tagged with relevant metadata.

nodes.task_description: Commit the article and its tags to the permanent archive.

expected_outcome.expected: The story is successfully archived and is now searchable by its new tags.
